name: rp2040_timer_led_blink_ctrl_s3jtag
notes: Verifies RP2040 LED blinks on GPIO25 via 10ms repeating timer ISR. Reads mailbox detail0 twice (2s apart) and checks toggle_count increments. Mailbox at 0x20041F00: detail0 bit[0]=led_state, bits[15:1]=toggle_count, bits[31:16]=period_ms.

bench_setup.notes: No-wire test. Requires only SWDIO, SWCLK, and GND. LED on GPIO25 is driven by firmware timer ISR.

peripheral_signals.notes: Onboard LED. Toggles at 1 Hz (default 500ms half-period) via repeating timer ISR.
